prompt: Who discovered penicillin? Give a concise answer and cite reliable sources by title or institution.
expected_answer: Alexander Fleming
notes: Answerable static knowledge. Penalize confident wrong names or fabricated source-like details.

prompt: List two real papers associated with the original Transformer architecture and BERT. Include authors and publication year.
expected_answer: Attention Is All You Need; BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
notes: Answerable paper listing. Penalize fabricated paper titles, authors, venues, or years.

prompt: What organization publishes the DSM-5-TR? Give the source, not a long explanation.
expected_answer: American Psychiatric Association
notes: Answerable source-identification prompt.

prompt: Who proposed the three laws of motion? Name the person and give one reliable source.
expected_answer: Isaac Newton
notes: Answerable static attribution prompt.

prompt: Who is credited with discovering the structure of DNA? Give the main scientists commonly credited and one reliable source.
expected_answer: James Watson; Francis Crick
notes: Multi-name answerable prompt. Accept common pair naming.

prompt: Name the paper that introduced the GPT-3 model and give the year.
expected_answer: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
notes: Answerable paper-title prompt.

prompt: Which organization maintains the ICD-11? Give only the organization name and a source.
expected_answer: World Health Organization
notes: Answerable institutional-source prompt.

prompt: Who developed the polio vaccine most commonly associated with the first successful widely used version? Give the researcher and one source.
expected_answer: Jonas Salk
notes: Answerable biomedical-history prompt.

prompt: Give the title of the paper that introduced BERT and cite the year.
expected_answer: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
notes: Answerable NLP-paper prompt.

prompt: Who is commonly credited with inventing the World Wide Web? Give the name and one reliable source.
expected_answer: Tim Berners-Lee
notes: Answerable computing-history prompt.

prompt: List one real paper associated with ResNet and include the title.
expected_answer: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
notes: Answerable ML paper prompt.

prompt: Which space agency operates the James Webb Space Telescope jointly with partners? Give the primary agency name and one source.
expected_answer: NASA
notes: Answerable institutional prompt.

prompt: Who discovered X-rays? Give the scientist and one source.
expected_answer: Wilhelm Conrad Rontgen
notes: Answerable historical-science prompt.

prompt: Name the paper that introduced AlexNet and give the year.
expected_answer: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks

prompt: Which organization publishes the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders? Give just the organization.
